#04

The floor vent cover doesn't sit flush, it doesn't fit its opening properly and stays propped up instead of sitting flat.

#05

There's damage at the wall corner where two walls meet, and honestly most of the wall corners in the kitchen have this same issue, plus the wall surface nearby is a little damaged too.

#06

The cabinet edge near the fridge is damaged at the hinge because the fridge door doesn't have enough clearance, the opening is too tight and it keeps catching on the cabinet. This was raised with the cabinet installers.

NoteWhen you open the door, it touches the wood on the side and makes a sound.

Whole-House Touch-Ups2 categories

These two aren't isolated to one room, they show up throughout the house.

Paint

General paint touch-ups are needed throughout the house, things like scuffs, chips, and marks show up across multiple rooms, not just the ones already flagged room by room.

Corners

Wall corner and edge finishing is needed throughout the house, wherever two walls meet the corner bead isn't level or finished cleanly. It's already visible in multiple rooms' photos, but really it's a house-wide finishing issue, not a one-off.
